reviews.comment:
No tiene nada en particular y los que atienden son un poco apáticos como casi toda la gente de ese pueblo... da la sensación que no les gustan las visitas

It's nothing special, and the staff are a bit apathetic, like almost everyone in that town... you get the feeling they don't like visitors.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena predisposición de los plateros. Si quieren pagar con la app YPF pidanle el wifi que te dan acceso.

(Translated by Google)
The silversmiths are very helpful. If you want to pay with the YPF app, ask them for the Wi-Fi they give you access to.

reviews.comment:
Podría ser mejor, un día solo tenian por ejemplo nafta super, no habia otra, tampoco tenian variedad en el mercado para comprar. Deberian mejorar por la cantidad de movimiento que tiene.

(Translated by Google)
It could be better. One day, for example, they only had premium gasoline; there was no other type. There wasn't much variety in the market either. They should improve because of the high volume of traffic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtM1BlblRnEAE
